translations.en: a stalwart fellow, with a look of placid concentration.
translations.zh: 一位堅毅的男子，神情平靜而專注。

translations.en: You think you see a brief flicker of recognition pass between @Iolo and the fisherman.
translations.zh: 汝似乎察覺@Iolo（尤洛）與這位漁夫之間閃過一絲認識的神色。

translations.en: But before you can be certain, he turns to address you.
translations.zh: 然在汝確認之前，他便轉身向汝致意。

translations.en: "Good $T. Is there anything I can do for you?"
translations.zh: 「$T安。有何需要效勞？」

translations.en: "Hello, $P. It's good to see you again."
translations.zh: 「你好，$P，再次相見甚悅。」

translations.en: "Oh, forgive me for not introducing myself. I am Conor Starfalcon. And what is your name?"
translations.zh: 「哦，請恕在下未曾自我介紹。在下乃柯諾·星隼。汝尊名為何？」

translations.en: "Well met, $G!"
"We've met before. But that was many @years ago."
translations.zh: 「我們曾相識，但那是多@years（年）前之事了。」

translations.en: "Yes, long ago."
translations.zh: 「是的，久遠之前了。」

translations.en: "I am a fisherman. In catching @fish, as in all of life, there is something to be learned."
translations.zh: 「在下是個漁夫。捕@fish（魚）事，如同人生，處處皆有值得學習之道。」

translations.en: "I still have not mastered the @way of the fisherman."
translations.zh: 「在下至今仍未參透漁夫之@way（道）。」

translations.en: "But I think perhaps the key to enlightenment lies not so much in the destination as in the road one travels."
translations.zh: 「然在下以為，頓悟之鑰或許不在目的地，而在所走之路途本身。」

translations.en: "I am satisfied to live here and learn what I can from the fish."
translations.zh: 「在下安於此地生活，向魚兒學取一切可學之事。」

translations.en: "The Shrine of Humility is far to the southeast."
translations.zh: 「謙遜聖壇在遙遠的東南方。」

translations.en: "I'd be glad to take you there in my @boat, but I'm afraid it is too small to weather the high seas."
translations.zh: 「在下樂意以@boat（小船）帶汝前往，怎奈小船太小，無法抵禦大海波濤。」

translations.en: "It's down at the beach. Feel free to borrow it if you have need."
translations.zh: 「小船在海灘上，若有需要盡可借用。」

translations.en: "You seek to find the humblest in New Magincia? That's a difficult task."
translations.zh: 「汝要尋找新馬精西亞最謙遜之人？這是個艱難的任務。」

translations.en: "I'd hate to commend one of my neighbors to you and fail to do justice to the others."
translations.zh: 「在下不願推薦某位鄰居而對其他人有失公允。」

translations.en: "The one thing I can tell you for certain is that it isn't me you're looking for."
translations.zh: 「在下唯一可確告汝的是：汝所尋之人並非在下。」

translations.en: "The Mantra of Humility is 'lum'. If you seek the @shrine, I hope you find it."
translations.zh: 「謙遜真言是『lum』。若汝尋訪@shrine（聖壇），願汝得達。」

translations.en: "I used to be a guildmaster. But that was long ago."
translations.zh: 「在下曾是公會長，然那已是久遠之前的事了。」

translations.en: "I no longer follow the way of the warrior."
translations.zh: 「在下已不再追隨武者之道。」

translations.en: "If I can help you with anything else, let me know."
translations.zh: 「若在下能有所效勞，請告知。」

translations.en: "I can't help you with that."
translations.zh: 「此事在下愛莫能助。」

translator_notes: 094 Conor: 新馬精西亞漁夫，禪意哲思。昔日公會長，熟識尤洛。謙遜真言'lum'保留。
